Miguel Brandão

Full Stack Developer - Node.js • Laravel • Ruby on Rails • React • Vue
Portimão, Portugal • miguellbwork@gmail.com • linkedin.com/in/miguellbpt • github.com/MiguellBrandao

Professional Summary

Full Stack Developer with experience in end-to-end web application development, acting in both backend and frontend using Node.js, Laravel, Ruby on Rails, React, Vue, and React Native. Focused on REST APIs, integrations, automation, and data-driven systems, with hands-on deployments in AWS and Firebase.

Technical Skills

Backend: Node.js (Express), NestJS, Laravel, CakePHP, Ruby on Rails
Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue, React Native, Angular (Basics)
Databases: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MariaDB/MySQL, MongoDB
Infra: Docker, AWS, Firebase, Git/GitHub

Professional Experience

W4M - Mid-Level Full Stack Developer

May 2025 - Sep 2025
Laravel • Yii • SQL Server • PostgreSQL • Vue
  • Optimized backend APIs in Laravel/Yii, reducing latency in critical endpoints by ~40%.
  • Implemented asynchronous large-volume data imports via Laravel Queues and cron jobs.
  • Reduced direct calls to external APIs by consolidating data through scheduled imports and database persistence.
  • Executed data migration from SQL Server to PostgreSQL, adapting existing queries and indexes.
  • Developed frontend features in Vue to support new internal workflows.

The Wave Coworking - Full Stack Developer

Jun 2024 - Jan 2025
Next.js • NestJS • React Native • TypeScript • AWS
  • Developed web and mobile platforms for property showcase and management (admin, metrics, and content).
  • Created an event ticketing system integrating payments via webhooks and automated ticket issuance (PDF) via email.
  • Implemented event management, check-in validation, premium user access, and promotional codes.
  • Developed an internal QR code system for validation and operational workflows using TypeScript and NestJS.
  • Worked as the sole developer, responsible for architecture, implementation, and AWS deployment.

HubAtivo - Full Stack Developer Intern

Mar 2024 - Aug 2024
NestJS • MongoDB • Leaflet • React
  • Developed REST APIs in NestJS for a real estate platform.
  • Implemented geographic visualization and filters using Leaflet, improving the search experience.
  • Implemented administrative modules (content and user management) in React integrated with the backend.
  • Mentored 3 interns in Node.js and frontend fundamentals.

Octus Pay - Junior Full Stack Developer

Apr 2023 - Sep 2023
Laravel • MariaDB • Frontend Web
  • Developed Laravel backend for an online course platform (user, course, and permission management).
  • Implemented admin panels and frontend-backend integrations via REST APIs.

Smart Cities Lagoa - Full Stack Intern

May 2023 - Jul 2023
Python • Tesseract OCR • OpenCV • React Native
  • Created an OCR system in Python (Tesseract/OpenCV) for automatic reading of water meters.
  • Developed a React Native app for field capture and reading registration in the user flow.
  • Reduced a monthly multi-hour manual process to just a few minutes per reading.

Projects

Irrivio Garden

NestJS • Next.js • Drizzle ORM • PostgreSQL • Turborepo
  • Built a full-stack monorepo for multi-company garden maintenance operations with a NestJS API and a Next.js web app.
  • On the frontend, implemented role-based dashboards, active company selection, tenant branding, and management flows for gardens, teams, stock, quotes, and reports.
  • On the backend, implemented JWT authentication with refresh-token cookies, RBAC through company memberships, and PostgreSQL + Drizzle data modeling with tenant isolation.

Booking Marketplace

NestJS • Next.js • PostgreSQL • Redis • BullMQ
  • Built a full-stack booking marketplace monorepo with a NestJS API and a Next.js admin frontend.
  • Implemented listing and availability-block CRUD, booking lifecycle (pending/confirmed/cancelled/expired), and host operational dashboards with filters.
  • Ensured booking consistency under concurrency using transactions + pessimistic locking, with asynchronous expiration handled by BullMQ/Redis.

VINC

React • Supabase • BullMQ
  • Platform that automates capturing and extracting invoices received via corporate email with AI.
  • Implemented highly reliable background job queues using BullMQ for non-blocking, parallel processing.
  • Fast backend architecture powered by Supabase and structured data extraction utilizing large language models.
